claim: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed to US/Israel-linked vessels

sub_questions.question: Who originally made the claim that the Strait of Hormuz is effectively closed to US/Israel-linked vessels, or was @currentreport1 the originator?
What specifically does 'effectively closed' mean in this context (e.g., official declaration, increased attacks, heightened risk)?
When was this claim first made or widely reported?
Are there other credible news sources or official statements reporting this closure?
How are 'US/Israel-linked vessels' defined in the context of this claim?
